name: Dragon Hide
description: You manifest scales and claws reminiscent of your draconic ancestors. You increase your Strength, Constitution, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20. While you aren't wearing armor, your AC equals 13 + your Dexterity modifier (shields allowed). You grow claws that are natural weapons for unarmed strikes, dealing 1d4 + Strength modifier slashing damage.
